project.title: Managed Storage API
project.description: A managed key/value storage API: tenants store and retrieve records via API keys, and a scheduled job periodically validates the URLs they've stored.

flow.title: Storage & Validation Flow
flow.description: Each request is authenticated against an API key and reads or writes a record; a separate scheduled worker periodically validates stored URLs and writes back their status.

steps.title: API Request
steps.description: Client sends a read or write call with an API key.

steps.title: API Key Validator
steps.description: Looks up the key, verifies it isn't revoked or rate-limited, resolves the owning tenant.

steps.title: Record Service
steps.description: Reads or writes a record for the tenant. URL fields are flagged for the validator.

steps.title: Record Store
steps.description: Primary store of records, keyed by tenant + record id.

steps.title: Audit Log
steps.description: Append-only log of every access event (who, when, what).

steps.title: Validation Scheduler
steps.description: Cron job that wakes up and picks records whose URLs are due for revalidation.

steps.title: URL Validator
steps.description: Issues an HTTP HEAD/GET against each URL and captures status + last-checked time.
